transcript: Uncle, you better come look at this. What? There's a white man standing in the street. I've seen one. Not like this. Dial 911. Tell the police to get up here quick. Somebody's about to get killed. Having a nice day, sir? You feeling all right? Not to get too personal, but a white man standing in the middle of Harlem wearing a sign that says I hate niggas has either got some serious personal issues or not all his dogs are barking hey I'm talking to you about 10 seconds before those guys see you when they do they will kill you you understand you are about to have a very bad day tell me about it sir this is a police matter for your own safety i'm gonna damn right it's a police matter for your own safety i suggest you hide your butt in my shop till the police get here what the fuck
